title: Set up Firebase Authentication in Next.js
summary: Add Firebase Auth to a Next.js app with Google/Email sign-in, server-side session cookies via Firebase Admin SDK, and middleware-based route protection.
declaration: I will integrate Firebase Authentication into this Next.js project. This covers client-side sign-in (Google OAuth and email/password), session cookies using the Firebase Admin SDK, and route protection via Next.js middleware. If you prefer Clerk or Auth.js instead, say so before I begin.
